summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kaisō Sushi España reservation system with updated API tests matching actual implementation. Backend APIs 100% functional (18/18 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with premium dark theme, multilingual support, and admin panel. All key business features validated.
passed_tests: Backend API tests: 18/18 passed (100% success rate)
API root endpoint responding correctly
Restaurant config endpoint with all required fields (name, phone, address, tasting menu price, discount settings)
Availability endpoint correctly handles different day schedules (Tue-Thu vs Fri-Sun vs Monday closed)
Time slots generated at 15-minute intervals as required
Tuesday discount days correctly identified with 10% discount
Monday blocking working (restaurant closed)
Friday extended lunch hours (12:30-15:00) vs weekday (12:30-14:30)
Tasting menu restrictions properly enforced (Tue-Thu 19:00-21:00 only)
Reservation creation with all required fields and validations
WhatsApp message generation with proper formatting
Admin authentication working with admin/reservas credentials
Admin stats endpoint returning all required fields
Admin reservation management (get, update status)
Admin blackout dates management (add, remove, list)
Landing page loads with premium dark theme (#050608) and gold accents (#C9A24A)
KAISŌ SIGNATURE STANDARD badge prominently displayed
Language selector (ES/PT/EN) working with localStorage persistence
Reservation modal opens correctly with date selection calendar
Discount notice displayed for Tuesday-Thursday dates
Admin panel login successful with correct credentials
Admin panel displays 4 stats cards (today reservations, guests, pending, confirmed)
Admin panel tabs (Reservas/Configuración) working
Admin panel date navigation and filtering working
Export CSV functionality available
Premium dark design theme implemented correctly throughout
